title: Frontend Developer
description: We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Front-End Developer to join our team who will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining responsive and user-friendly web applications. The ideal candidate should have strong proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript (ES6+), with hands-on experience in modern front-end frameworks such as React, Angular, or Vue. The role involves translating UI/UX design wireframes into high-quality functional code, ensuring cross-browser compatibility, optimizing applications for maximum speed and scalability, and integrating RESTful APIs in collaboration with back-end developers. Candidates should have a bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field (or equivalent experience), along with experience using Git for version control and applying best practices for clean, maintainable code. Knowledge of responsive design principles, CSS frameworks like Bootstrap or Tailwind, and testing tools such as Jest or Cypress is an advantage. The successful applicant must possess strong problem-solving skills, attention to detail, good communication abilities, and the capability to work effectively in a collaborative and fast-paced environment while meeting project deadlines.
